slides.heading: Ukuphela KweMpi Yomqando Nohlelo Olusha Lomhlaba
slides.lead: Indlela umhlaba owawuhlukene phakathi ngo-1989 owavula ngayo indlela yokuwa kweSoviet Union ngo-1991 - kanye nesikhathi somhlaba ohlangene onezwe elilodwa elinamandla amakhulu (single-superpower).

image.alt: Udonga oludabukile oluhlukanisa umhlaba obhajwe phakathi, kufanekisela ukuwa kweKhethini Lensimbi (Iron Curtain).
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='160' cy='90' r='66' fill='#8ba7c4'/><path d='M110 42 q22 18 4 44 q-18 22 6 52' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='6'/><path d='M206 40 q-18 26 2 50 q16 22 -4 48' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='6'/><path d='M160 20 L152 60 L168 92 L150 126 L164 160' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='7' stroke-linejoin='round'/><rect x='40' y='150' width='240' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Qala ngokukhumbula lokho abafundi asebekwazi ngeMpi Yomqando kusuka ku-Sihloko 3: ukuncintisana kweminyaka eminingi phakathi kweNtshonalanga yobungxiwankulu (eyayiholwa yi-USA) neMpumalanga yobukhomanisi (eyayiholwa yi-USSR), okwalwelwa ngezimpi ezenziwa ngabanye (proxy wars), umjaho wezikhali kanye nemibono yezombusazwe kunokulwa ngokuqondile. Bonisa kusengaphambili imibuzo emibili emikhulu yalesi sihloko: (1) Kungani iqembu leSoviet lawa ngokushesha kangaka phakathi kuka-1989 no-1991? (2) Yiluphi uhlobo lohlelo lomhlaba olwathatha indawo yalo?

slides.heading: Umhlaba ohlukene phakathi ngeminyaka yawo-1980
slides.lead: Iminyaka engaphezu kwengamashumi amane amazwe amabili anamandla amakhulu (superpowers) ahlukanisa umhlaba waba ngamaqembu aphikisanayo.

blocks.text: Ngemva kuka-1945 umhlaba **wawuhlukene phakathi (bipolar)**: i-United States yayihola iNtshonalanga yobungxiwankulu neyentando yeningi nge-**NATO**, kanti iSoviet Union yayihola iMpumalanga yobukhomanisi nge-**Warsaw Pact**. IYurophu yayihlukaniswe yilokho uChurchill akubiza ngokuthi *Ikhethini Lensimbi (Iron Curtain)*, okwakufanekiselwa **uDonga LaseBerlin (Berlin Wall)** (owakhiwa ngo-1961).

items: Ukuncintisana kwaba sesimweni somjaho wezikhali, umjaho wemikhathi (space race) nezimpi ezalwelwa ngabanye (Korea, Vietnam, Angola).
Womabili amaqembu ayefuna abangane e-Afrika, e-Asia naseLatin America.
Usongo lwempi yenuzi (nuclear) lwenza ukungqubuzana okuqondile kwamazwe anamandla amakhulu kube yingozi enkulu kakhulu - yingakho kwabizwa ngempi 'yomqando'.

slides.notes: Qinisa amagama abafundi abazowadinga: ukuhlukana phakathi (bipolar), izwe elinamandla amakhulu (superpower), i-NATO, i-Warsaw Pact, Ikhethini Lensimbi (Iron Curtain), impi elwelwa ngabanye (proxy war). Gcizelela ukuthi ngeminyaka yawo-1980 lokhu kuhlukana kwakubonakala kungapheli - cishe akekho owabikezela ukuthi kuzophela phakathi kweminyaka eyishumi. Lokhu kwenza ijubane lokuwa kuka-1989 kuya ku-1991 kube yinkinga eyisisekelo yalesi sihloko.

slides.heading: Kungani uhlelo lweSoviet lwaluphakathi kwengcindezi
slides.lead: Maphakathi neminyaka yawo-1980 ubuthakathaka obujulile besakhiwo base bakhile ngaphakathi e-USSR.

blocks.heading: Umnotho ongathuthuki
blocks.text: Ukuhlela okuphakathi (central planning) akukwazanga ukufinyelela emazingeni okuphila aseNtshonalanga; kwakukhona ukushoda kwezimpahla nentuthuko encane.

blocks.heading: Izindleko zombuso
blocks.text: Umjaho wezikhali kanye nempi ebiza kakhulu e-Afghanistan (1979-1989) kwakhipha imali eningi kwisabelomali seSoviet.

blocks.heading: Ukulahlekelwa ukholo
blocks.text: Inkohlakalo nokuvimbela ukukhuluma (censorship) kwadicilela ukwethemba komphakathi kubukhomanisi kulo lonke i-USSR neYurophu eseMpumalanga.

slides.notes: Hlela lezi njengezimbangela zesikhathi eside (zesakhiwo), okumele zihlukaniswe nembangela yesikhathi esifushane yezinguquko zikaGorbachev esilaydini esilandelayo. Ukuhlaziya kwe-FET okuqinile kuhlukanisa izimbangela ezizisekelo nezimbangela ezisheshayo. Cela abafundi bacabange: ngabe izinguquko zodwa zaziyokwazi yini ukusindisa uhlelo, noma lezi zinkinga zase zibulala kakade?

slides.heading: UGorbachev: i-glasnost ne-perestroika
slides.lead: Izinguquko ebezihloselwe ukusindisa iSoviet Union zagcina zisheshisa ukuwa kwayo.

blocks.text: **UMikhail Gorbachev** waba nguNobhala-Jikelele weQembu lamaKhomanisi ngoMashi 1985. Ukuze avuselele uhlelo olwaluwohloka, waqalisa izinguquko ezimbili: i-**glasnost** ('ukuvuleka' - inkululeko yokukhuluma nokugxeka eyandisiwe) ne-**perestroika** ('ukwakha kabusha' - izinguquko ezilinganiselwe zemakethe).

items: I-glasnost yavumela abantu ukuba baveze izikhalo umbuso owawuzithulise isikhathi eside.
I-perestroika yaxegisa ukulawula okuphakathi kodwa yaphazamisa umnotho nakakhulu.
UGorbachev waphinde waqeda i-Brezhnev Doctrine, ebonisa ukuthi i-USSR yayingeke isasebenzisa amandla ukusekela ohulumeni bamakhomanisi baseYurophu eseMpumalanga.

image.alt: Imicibisholo emibili, omunye uvuleka uphume ngaphandle kanti omunye wakha kabusha izigaxa, kufanekisela ukuvuleka nokwakha kabusha.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='70' cy='80' r='34' fill='#8ba7c4'/><path d='M70 56 v48 M70 56 l-12 12 M70 56 l12 12' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='6' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><g fill='#2f5233'><rect x='140' y='96' width='22' height='22'/><rect x='166' y='96' width='22' height='22'/><rect x='153' y='72' width='22' height='22'/></g><rect x='134' y='120' width='68' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Iphuzu eliyinhloko lokuhlaziya: uGorbachev wayehlose ukuGUQULA ubukhomanisi, hhayi ukubuqeda. Ngokuvumela ukugxekwa (i-glasnost) nangokushiya i-Brezhnev Doctrine, wasusa kokubili ukwesaba namandla okwakubambe iqembu ndawonye. Lesi yisibonelo esidumile semiphumela engahlosiwe - siwusizo ekubhaleni i-eseyi ngezimbangela.

slides.heading: IYurophu eseMpumalanga iyazikhulula
slides.lead: Kwathi iMoscow ingasangeneleli, ohulumeni bamakhomanisi bawa omunye emva komunye.

blocks.text: Ngo-1989 igagasi lezinguquko ezinkulu ezazicishe zonke zaba nokuthula lasakaza kulo lonke iYurophu eseMpumalanga. I-**Poland** yabamba ukhetho olwaluvuleke ngokwengxenye olwawinwa yi-*Solidarity*; i-**Hungary** yavula umngcele wayo; kwathi ngomhla ka-**9 Novemba 1989 uDonga LaseBerlin lwawa**, izikhungo zalo zokuhlola zagxotshwa yizixuku.

items: 'IVelvet Revolution' enokuthula yaseCzechoslovakia yaqeda ukubusa kwamakhomanisi.
E-Romania umashiqela uNicolae Ceausescu wagumbuqelwa wabulawa.
Izithombe zabantu abavamile bebhidliza uDonga LaseBerlin zaba uphawu lokuphela kweMpi Yomqando.

image.alt: Ingxenye yodonga olunemidwebo (graffiti) olunesikhala esikhulu lapho izitini zikhishiwe, abantu bedlula khona.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 160' role='img'><rect width='260' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#c8b89a' stroke='#b7a98d' stroke-width='1'><rect x='10' y='50' width='40' height='18'/><rect x='52' y='50' width='40' height='18'/><rect x='10' y='70' width='40' height='18'/><rect x='52' y='70' width='40' height='18'/><rect x='10' y='90' width='40' height='18'/><rect x='52' y='90' width='40' height='18'/><rect x='168' y='50' width='40' height='18'/><rect x='210' y='50' width='40' height='18'/><rect x='168' y='70' width='40' height='18'/><rect x='210' y='70' width='40' height='18'/><rect x='168' y='90' width='40' height='18'/><rect x='210' y='90' width='40' height='18'/></g><rect x='24' y='38' width='16' height='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='214' y='38' width='16' height='6' fill='#2f5233'/><g fill='#7a5a3a'><circle cx='118' cy='96' r='8'/><rect x='112' y='104' width='12' height='24'/><circle cx='142' cy='96' r='8'/><rect x='136' y='104' width='12' height='24'/></g><rect x='10' y='130' width='240' height='6' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gcizelela igalelo labantu: lezi kwakuyizinguquko ezicishe zonke zazinokuthula, ezishukunyiswa abantu, hhayi izehlakalo ezaziyalelwa ngenhla. Qaphela umphumela we-domino - kwathi iMoscow isicacisile ukuthi ngeke ithumele amathangi (njengoba yayenzile eHungary 1956 naseCzechoslovakia 1968), ukuwa ngakunye kwakhuthaza okulandelayo. Ukuwa koDonga ngomhla ka-9 Novemba 1989 yilona langa elilodwa okungenzeka kakhulu livele embuzweni osekelwe emithonjeni. [SME] Qinisekisa ukuthi uyafuna ukufaka imininingwane yokubulawa kukaCeausescu kulesi sigaba; kuphathe ngobunono.

slides.heading: Kusukela oDongeni kuya ekupheleni kwe-USSR, 1989-1991

blocks.alt: Uhlu lwesikhathi lwezehlakalo ezibalulekile kusukela ku-1989 kuya ku-1991.

events.label: I-Solidarity iwina ukhetho oluvuleke ngokwengxenye e-Poland
Izinguquko kulo lonke iYurophu eseMpumalanga; iNgqungquthela yaseMalta

slides.notes: Sebenzisa lesi silaydi ukuqinisa ukulandelana kwezehlakalo ngaphambi kokuhlaziya imiphumela. Veza ijubane elikhulayo: izinguquko kusukela ku-1985, izinguquko ezinkulu ngo-1989, kanye ne-USSR ngokwayo esiphelile ekupheleni kuka-1991 - iminyaka eyisithupha kuphela. Abafundi kufanele bakwazi ukubeka okungenani uDonga (1989) nokuchithwa kwe-USSR (1991) ngokunembile.

slides.heading: Ukuwa kweSoviet Union
slides.lead: Njengoba umbuso wangaphandle uwa, i-USSR ngokwayo yahlukana yaba ngamazwe azimele ayishumi nanhlanu.

blocks.text: I-glasnost yayivuse futhi **ubuzwe (nationalism)** ngaphakathi e-USSR. Amazwe aseBaltic (iLithuania, iLatvia, i-Estonia) namanye afuna inkululeko. Ngo-**Agasti 1991** amakhomanisi aqinile enza umzamo wokuketula uGorbachev; wawa phakathi nezinsuku ezimbalwa, wehliswa isithunzi kakhulu lapho izixuku no-**Boris Yeltsin** bewumelana nawo.

items: Umzamo wokuketula owahluleka wadiliza igunya kokubili leQembu lamaKhomanisi noGorbachev.
Ngokulandelana amariphabhulikhi eSoviet amemezela inkululeko.
Ngomhla ka-26 Disemba 1991 i-USSR yachithwa ngokusemthethweni futhi uGorbachev wesula; iMpi Yomqando yayisiphelile.

image.alt: Inkanyezi ebomvu enkulu eyodwa ihlukana ibe yizinkanyezi ezincane ezehlukene eziyishumi nanhlanu.

slides.notes: Dweba umehluko phakathi kokuwa kweqembu langaphandle (iYurophu eseMpumalanga, 1989) nokuhlakazeka kwe-USSR ngokwayo (1991). Ubuzwe obakhululwa yi-glasnost baba nesandla esikhulu ngaphakathi enyunyaneni. Ukuphakama kukaYeltsin nokuwa kukaGorbachev kubonisa ukudluliselwa kwamandla eRussia entsha. Gcizelela ukuthi lokhu akuqedanga uhulumeni kuphela kodwa izwe elinamandla amakhulu kanye nephrojekthi yonke yombono wezombusazwe.

slides.heading: Izwe elilodwa elinamandla amakhulu, imibuzo eminingi
slides.lead: Ngokuhamba kwe-USSR, i-United States yasala iyilona zwe kuphela emhlabeni elinamandla amakhulu - 'isikhathi somandla amunye (unipolar moment)'.

blocks.text: Uhlelo olusha lomhlaba... olukhululeke kakhulu osongweni lobuphixiphixi, oluqine kakhulu ekufuneni ubulungiswa, futhi oluvikeleke kakhulu ekufuneni ukuthula.
blocks.cite: UMongameli wase-US uGeorge H. W. Bush, inkulumo kwiCongress, 11 Septhemba 1990

blocks.text: Abaholi bakhuluma **ngohlelo olusha lomhlaba** lapho izizwe zaziyobambisana nge-**United Nations (Izizwe Ezihlangene)** kunokuhlukana zibe ngamaqembu anobutha. Abanye abacabangi baze bamemezela ukunqoba kwentando yeningi ekhululekile nemakethe ekhululekile njengesibonelo sekusasa.

items: I-USA yaba ngamandla abusayo kwezempi, kwezomnotho nakumasiko.
Iziqiniseko ezindala zanyamalala kwavela izingxabano ezintsha (zobuhlanga, zesifunda).
Abagxeki baphikisa ngokuthi 'uhlelo olusha' ikakhulukazi lwasebenzela izidingo zaseNtshonalanga.

slides.notes: Ethula umqondo womhlaba onamandla amunye (unipolar) nempikiswano emayelana nawo. Isicaphuno sikaBush singumthombo wangempela oyisisekelo (primary source) oluwusizo embuzweni osekelwe emithonjeni. Sho ngombono kaFrancis Fukuyama 'wokuphela komlando' (end of history) njengombono othembayo, uwuqhathanise nababukela phansi ababona kusengaphambili ukungazinzi okusha (isibonelo izimpi zaseYugoslavia zawo-1990). Khuthaza abafundi ukuba balinganise izincazelo eziphikisanayo. [SME] Qinisekisa amagama/usuku olunembile lwesicaphuno sikaBush ngokusekelwe embhalweni wangempela ngaphambi kokukhiqizwa.

slides.heading: Ukukhula kwe-globalisation (ukuhlangana komhlaba)
slides.lead: Ukuphela kweMpi Yomqando kwasheshisa ukuhlangana komnotho namasiko omhlaba.

blocks.heading: Kwezomnotho
blocks.text: Uhwebo olukhululeke kakhulu, izinkampani ezisebenza emazweni amaningi kanye nezinhlangano ezifana ne-WTO kwabophela ndawonye iminotho yezizwe.

blocks.heading: Kwezobuchwepheshe
blocks.text: I-inthanethi, imidiya yamasathelayithi kanye nokuxhumana okushibhile kwanciphisa amabanga cishe ngobusuku obubodwa.

blocks.heading: Kwamasiko
blocks.text: Imibono, amabhrendi kanye namasiko adumile kwasakazeka emhlabeni wonke, kuvusa izimpikiswano ngobunikazi nokungalingani.

slides.notes: Chaza i-globalisation njengokuhlangana okukhulayo kweminotho, ubuchwepheshe namasiko omhlaba. Gcizelela ukuthi ayiqalanga ngo-1989 - kodwa ukuwa kweqembu lamakhomanisi kwasusa isithiyo esikhulu futhi kwavulela amazwe ayekade engaphansi kweqembu laseMpumalanga emakethe yomhlaba. Veza kokubili izinzuzo (ukukhula, ukuxhumana) nokugxekwa (ukungalingani, ukulahlekelwa ukulawula kwendawo), ulungisela abafundi impikiswano elinganiselwe.

slides.heading: Ukuphela kweMpi Yomqando neNingizimu Afrika
slides.lead: Ukuwa kweqembu leSoviet kwaguqula ubunjalo bezombusazwe eminyakeni yokugcina yobandlululo.

blocks.text: Uhulumeni wobandlululo wayekade eyethula incindezelo njengokuzivikela ku-*rooi gevaar* ('ingozi ebomvu') yobukhomanisi. Njengoba iMpi Yomqando iphela, le mpikiswano yalahlekelwa ingxenye enkulu yamandla ayo, futhi ingcindezi yokuxoxisana yakhula. Ngomhla ka-**2 Februwari 1990** u-F. W. de Klerk wasusa umvimbo ku-ANC, i-PAC ne-SACP, kwathi ngomhla ka-**11 Februwari 1990** uNelson Mandela wakhululwa.

items: ISoviet Union yayikade ingumsekeli obalulekile we-ANC ne-SACP.
Ukuwa kwayo kwabuthakathisa ukwesekwa kwe-ANC okuvela ngaphandle kodwa kwaphinde kwasusa ukwesaba kweNtshonalanga 'kokuthathwa kwamandla ngamakhomanisi' eNingizimu Afrika.
Izazi-mlando eziningi zibona ukuphela kweMpi Yomqando njengesinye sezinto ezasiza ekwenzeni ukuba isivumelwano esixoxisanwe ngaso sikwazeke.

image.alt: Izandla ezimbili ezihlangana ekuxhawuleni phezu komdwebo webalazwe leNingizimu Afrika.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M70 40 q40 -8 90 6 q22 30 6 66 q-40 26 -84 8 q-26 -34 -12 -80 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='70' y='84' width='44' height='16' rx='8' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect x='128' y='84' width='44' height='16' rx='8' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='108' y='82' width='26' height='20' rx='6' fill='#dcd3c2'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi silaydi senza isihloko somlando womhlaba sibe ngesendawo - kubalulekile kwi-SAHO nakwi-CAPS, exhumanisa ukuphela kweMpi Yomqando noguquko lwaseNingizimu Afrika. Yenza isimangalo sembangela ngokucophelela: ukuphela kweMpi Yomqando kwakuyisinye sezinto eziningi (kanye nokumelana kwangaphakathi, izijeziso zomnotho nengcindezi yomnotho) ezabumba izingxoxo. Gwema ukukukhulisa ngokweqile njengembangela eyodwa. [SME] Amandla oxhumano lwembangela phakathi kokuphela kweMpi Yomqando nokususwa kwemivimbo ngo-1990 kuyaphikiswana ngakho phakathi kwezazi-mlando - phawula ukuze i-SME ilungise amagama ukuze kube nokunemba kwezivivinyo.

slides.heading: Kungani iMpi Yomqando yaphela? Imibono emibili
slides.lead: Izazi-mlando azivumelani ngokuthi yini eyayibaluleke kakhulu - ukuhlaziya okuqinile kulinganisa kokubili.

columns.text: Omunye umbono ubalela ingcindezi yaseNtshonalanga: umjaho wezikhali kanye nobuholi obuqinile (uReagan, uThatcher) umnotho weSoviet owawungakwazi ukufinyelela kuwo, okwawuphoqa ukuba udele.
Omunye umbono ugcizelela ukubola kwangaphakathi: ukungathuthuki komnotho, izinguquko zikaGorbachev kanye nezinqumo zabantu abavamile eYurophu eseMpumalanga kwadilizela phansi uhlelo.

slides.notes: Bonisa ukucabanga kwezazi-mlando: kuyivelakancane ukuthi kube nembangela eyodwa. Khuthaza abafundi ukuba bahlanganise - izazi-mlando eziningi zihlanganisa kokubili, zibona ingcindezi yangaphandle KANYE nobuthakathaka bangaphakathi. Lolu hlobo lwesahlulelo esilinganiselwe, esilinganiswe ngobufakazi yilokho kanye i-rubric ye-eseyi ye-FET ekuklomelisayo. Buza abafundi ukuthi yimuphi umbono abawuthola ukholisa kakhulu nokuthi kungani.

slides.heading: Umhlaba oshintshile
slides.lead: Izehlakalo zika-1989-1991 zaguqula ezombusazwe, ezomnotho nempilo yansuku zonke emhlabeni wonke.

blocks.text: Ukuphela kweMpi Yomqando kwavala isahluko esibalulekile sekhulu lamashumi amabili leminyaka. Kwaqeda ukubhekana ngezikhali zenuzi phakathi kwamazwe anamandla amakhulu, kwavulela amazwe ayekade engawamakhomanisi entando yeningi nasezimakethe, kwasheshisa i-**globalisation** - kodwa akuzange kulethe ukuthula okuhlala njalo abaningi ababekulindele.

items: Kwavela izingxabano ezintsha, kuhlanganise nezimpi zobuhlanga eYugoslavia yangaphambili.
I-United States yaba ngamandla abusayo omhlaba, okungenani okwesikhathi esithile.
Izimpikiswano ngokungalingani, ukufuduka nobunikazi zisabumba umhlaba wanamuhla ohlangene (globalised).

slides.notes: Yisa isihloko kuze kube manje ('1989 kuya kwamanje' esihlokweni se-CAPS). 'Uhlelo olusha lomhlaba' lwaba yinkimbinkimbi futhi lwaphikiswa kakhulu kunalokho ababekade bethembile bekubikezela ekuqaleni. Lesi silaydi sixhumanisa emuva nezilaydi zohlelo olusha lomhlaba ne-globalisation futhi silungisela imibuzo yokubuyekeza. Mema abafundi ukuba baxhumanise le mikhakha nezehlakalo zamanje abazaziyo.

slides.heading: Esikufundile - imibuzo yokubuyekeza
slides.lead: Sebenzisa le mibuzo esitayeleni se-CAPS ukuvivinya izimbangela, ukuhlaziya imithombo nokubhala okwandisiwe.

blocks.text: **Isifinyezo:** Phakathi kuka-1989 no-1991 iqembu leSoviet lawa - lishukunyiswa ubuthakathaka bomnotho, izinguquko zikaGorbachev kanye nezinguquko ezinkulu ezazixhaswa ngabantu - kuphela iMpi Yomqando. Umphumela kwaba umhlaba onezwe elilodwa elinamandla amakhulu, ohlangana ngokushesha, kanye, eNingizimu Afrika, kwaba yingxenye yesimo esishintshayo soguquko oluya entandweni yeningi.

blocks.label: Q1
blocks.question: Chaza izizathu EZIMBILI zokuthi kungani iSoviet Union yawa phakathi kuka-1989 no-1991.

blocks.label: Q2
blocks.question: Usebenzisa uDonga LaseBerlin njengesibonelo, chaza ukuthi kungani u-1989 ubonwa njengephuzu eliguqula umlando womhlaba.

blocks.label: Q3
blocks.question: 'Ukuphela kweMpi Yomqando kwasiza ekwenzeni isivumelwano esixoxisanwe ngaso eNingizimu Afrika sibe nokwenzeka.' Uyavumelana? Sekela impendulo yakho ngobufakazi.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu emsebenzini obhaliwe noma engxoxweni; ukwabiwa kwamamaki kulingisa izitayela ze-CAPS zempendulo emfushane, zesigaba nezokubhala okwandisiwe. Umbuzo 3 wenziwe ngamabomu uvuleke ukuze abafundi baphikise nganoma yiluphi uhlangothi, uma nje besebenzisa ubufakazi - klomelisa isahlulelo esilinganiselwe kunempendulo 'elungile' emisiwe. Vala ngokuxhumanisa nesigaba esilandelayo somsebenzi noguquko lwaseNingizimu Afrika olufundwa kwenye indawo kuhlelo lwezifundo.
